title: codanthera biflora
intro: Codanthera biflora, also known as the 'Bee Flower' or 'Bee Orchid', is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain alkaloids that are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Codanthera biflora include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture by infusing the roots in hot water or mixing them with a solvent to extract its active compounds.
